title: Flawed Design
author: orphan_account
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
summary: He's been told since he was young that his quirk was going to make him pro. Becoming number one was his goal in life, and he was going to defeat anyone who was in his way. But since his arrival at Yuuei, he has seen what the pros of today are supposed to be. He has a quirk that can make him into a pro, but a personality and ethics that make pros question him.  He knows what people think of him, but they're wrong. They're all wrong. He would never become evil. He would never become a villain. But he also would do anything to become number one.

summary: After Deku's admission into Yuuei and the outcome of the Trial of Battle, Bakugou can no longer look down on Deku as the absolutely inferior idiot he'd always thought of him as. However, he's not sure how to feel about that something else, or about Deku in general anymore.

title: A Meaningless Fight
author: Prestocrayon
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
warnings: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
summary: Deku was always beneath him, but the one thing he had over him was that he recognized his weaknesses. Recognized them, and looked down on him - with an outstretched hand. Exposing them for everyone to see, making him look weak. He loved to make him look weak in order to make himself look better. Holding it over his head and taunting him.So when he needed to be weak and let out his feelings, he confronted Deku. It was simple. He'd show him the weakness he loved so much and then kick his ass and show him how wrong he was to look down on him for it.

They have to have had lived a full and complete life, retired and so on and so forth. Its heartbreaking when his sleep doesn't show this. Instead it gives him nightmares of probable "WHAT IF" possibilities.

Very quickly, people discover that even when it's a Free-For-All, nothing will stop Katsuki and Izuku from working side-by-side as a team until the bitter end.

title: Candescent
author: autumnalesque
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
tags: some of these will be very painful
i like to make my faves suffer
midoriya has the patience of a saint
summary: A collection of drabbles for various heroaca pairings. Some explicit, some not so much. Expect both ends of the spectrum here in terms of sad/happy as well, you've been warned. This will be updated as I get through more of my prompt backlog! Tags/pairings/characters will be updated accordingly. 1. Bakugou/Kirishima: "I'm here". Somewhere along the line, Katsuki loses track of time. Everything hurts, and then nothing hurts. The world has faded to silent darkness.2. Todoroki/Bakugou: "Gloves". “The fuck are you doing, half-and-half? Get on with it.” Bakugou growls, and Shouto’s lips quirk into the tiniest of smiles as he bites at loose fabric and pulls the glove off with his teeth.3. Bakugou/Midoriya: "Evidence". “You’re a real piece of fucking work, Deku,” Bakugou grumbles, a hand coming up to unconsciously cover the mark on his throat as he stomps back over and flops down on Izuku’s mattress again."4. Todoroki/Midoriya: "Puppy Love". Shouto’s childhood is mostly devoid of things as warm and bright as Midoriya Izuku, so he never forgets that face or the way it felt to have someone accept him so easily.

title: relationships for dumbasses
author: orphan_account
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
warnings: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
summary: It wasn’t until Todoroki fell in love that Bakugou discovered two things about his roommate he hadn’t known before: 1) Todoroki was a fruitcake. 2) He was awkward as hell when it came to love. The latter was more of a surprise than the former; anyone who dyed his hair like that couldn’t not be gay. “His name’s Midoriya,” Todoroki said, probably sighing with lovesickness and disgustingness under his resting bitch face. “And he's amazing.” Or,That college AU in which Bakugou suffers as an unwilling love guru, is surrounded by dumbasses, and falls in love himself.

Jirou Kyouka."Or the "i tried to call a crisis hotline but got one number off and started ranting for 10 minutes before you got to speak and tell me i got the wrong number but now you’re worried about me and telling me not to hang up" AU

His lips peel apart like he knows something, the scars around his mouth twist with a dark humor.“You think too loudly,” he mumbles, confirmation.“What the fuck do you know? You’re a goddamn genius,” Twice huffs back, raises his beer to his lips again.“Well,” says Dabi, and that’s all.
